meta.description: How old is your mind really? Take this fun 15-question quiz to discover your true mental age. Are you a young soul or a wise sage?
meta.keywords: mental age test, mental age quiz, brain age, psychological age, mind age test

intro.title: Mental Age Test
intro.subtitle: How old is your mind really?
intro.description: Answer 15 fun questions to discover your true mental age.
intro.description_2: Are you a young soul or a wise sage? Find out!

question.1: It's Saturday morning. What do you do first?
question.2: Your friend suggests trying a new restaurant. You...
question.3: How do you handle a disagreement?
question.5: When you hear a new slang word, you...
question.6: Your phone battery is at 5%. You...
question.7: How do you organize your space?
question.8: At a party, you're most likely to...
question.9: When making a big decision, you...
question.11: How do you react to change?
question.12: What do you value most in friendship?
question.13: Your approach to learning something new...
question.15: What gives you the most satisfaction?

option.1_1: Sleep in as long as possible
option.1_2: Check my phone and social media
option.1_3: Go for a run or workout
option.2_1: Jump at it! I love new places!
option.2_4: Ask about the menu and ambiance
option.3_4: Calmly state my position and listen
option.4_2: City exploration with lots to see
option.4_3: Cultural tour with history and art
option.5_2: Look it up to understand it
option.5_3: Find it amusing but don't use it
option.6_4: It's fine, I rarely check my phone
option.7_1: Creative chaos - I know where everything is
option.8_1: Head straight to the dance floor
option.8_2: Chat with as many people as possible
option.8_3: Have deep conversations with a few
option.9_2: Ask friends and family for advice
option.9_3: Make a detailed pros and cons list
option.9_4: Sleep on it for several days
option.13_1: Dive in and experiment right away
option.14_3: Write in a journal or reflect

age.youngSoul_description: Your mind buzzes with the energy of youth! You approach life with curiosity, spontaneity, and an infectious enthusiasm. You're not afraid to take risks, and your creativity knows no bounds.
age.youngSoul_trait_3: Quick to adapt and try new things
age.youngSoul_tip_1: Channel your energy into long-term goals for amazing results
age.youngSoul_tip_2: Practice patience - some of life's best things take time
age.freshMind_tagline: The perfect blend of youth and wisdom!
age.freshMind_description: You combine youthful energy with growing wisdom. You're ambitious yet thoughtful, bold yet considerate. This is the sweet spot where dreams meet determination.
age.freshMind_trait_1: Ambitious with a clear sense of direction
age.freshMind_trait_3: Good balance of fun and responsibility
age.freshMind_tip_1: Trust your instincts more - they're sharper than you think
age.freshMind_tip_2: Don't lose your sense of wonder as responsibilities grow
age.freshMind_famous: Elon Musk (in spirit), Marie Curie (early years), Steve Jobs (Apple founding era)
age.balancedThinker_tagline: The golden mean of mental maturity!
age.balancedThinker_description: Your mind has found its equilibrium. You balance logic with emotion, ambition with contentment, and action with reflection. You make thoughtful decisions while still enjoying life's pleasures.
age.balancedThinker_tip_1: Remember to step outside your comfort zone occasionally
age.balancedThinker_tip_2: Your stability is a gift - share it with those who need guidance
age.balancedThinker_famous: Barack Obama, Oprah Winfrey, Leonardo da Vinci
age.wiseMind_description: Your mental age reflects deep experience and acquired wisdom. You see patterns others miss, understand human nature intuitively, and approach life with calm confidence.
age.wiseMind_trait_3: Natural mentor and advisor to others
age.wiseMind_tip_1: Stay curious about new ideas and technologies
age.wiseMind_tip_2: Your wisdom is valuable - consider sharing it through teaching or writing
age.wiseMind_famous: Morgan Freeman, Dalai Lama, Meryl Streep
age.oldSoul_tagline: A timeless spirit in a modern world!
age.oldSoul_description: You carry the wisdom of ages. Your perspective transcends trends and fads, focusing on what truly matters. You appreciate depth over breadth, quality over quantity.
age.oldSoul_trait_1: Profound depth of thought and reflection
age.oldSoul_trait_3: Calm presence that puts others at ease
age.oldSoul_tip_1: Embrace some modern innovations - they can enhance your wisdom
age.oldSoul_tip_2: Your depth is rare - find others who appreciate meaningful connection
age.ancientSage_description: Your mental age transcends conventional measures. You possess a rare depth of understanding and philosophical outlook. You see the world through the lens of eternal truths.
age.ancientSage_trait_2: Inner peace regardless of external chaos
age.ancientSage_trait_3: Ability to see the big picture in everything
age.ancientSage_tip_1: Remember to enjoy life's simple pleasures alongside deep contemplation
age.ancientSage_tip_2: Share your wisdom generously - the world needs it more than ever

share.twitterText: My mental age is {age}! What's yours?
